{{CargoRelic
|name=Cat Membership Card
|class_id=20972
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Customized Cat Membership Cards for all vending machine users launched by CyberVendor Catrobot. Comply with Article 1856 of the CyberVendor War Law: It is prohibited to provide illegal discounts and promotions to customers!
|fame=32
|art=12
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail ATK +1<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail ATK +2<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail ATK +3<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail ATK +3<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per Premium Cat Food bought, Snail ATK +3<br>Premium Cat Food Bought: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
